title: Jaypee Hospital Consulting Pvt Ltd is Hiring: Consultant Physician (Senior)

jsonLd.title: Jaypee Hospital Consulting Pvt Ltd is Hiring: Consultant Physician (Senior)
jsonLd.description:
Jaypee Hospital Consulting Pvt Ltd, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Consultant Physician for our Jodhpur operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Jaypee Hospital Consulting Pvt Ltd:
Jaypee Hospital Consulting Pvt Ltd is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Medical Terminology
• Proficiency in NABH Standards
• Proficiency in Telemedicine
• Proficiency in Health Informatics
• Proficiency in Diagnostic Skills
• Proficiency in Infection Control
• Proficiency in CPT Codes
• Proficiency in Wound Care

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Flexible working hours
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Jodhpur, Rajasthan, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Jaypee Hospital Consulting Pvt Ltd!
